original_image_tags: A scan of a single, aged, off-white page. The page is blank except for text at the top and bottom. The paper shows minor discoloration and wear, with a dark, irregular edge visible on the right side. The text at the top and bottom is identical.

elements.description: The word 'RESTRICTED' is stamped or printed in black ink at the top center and bottom center of the page. The rest of the page is blank, off-white paper with no other visual elements.

judge.reason: Both sides agree the page is blank off-white paper with only text/stamps at top and bottom, but disagree on whether that text is identical (A) or reads 'RESTRICTED' (B).
